summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical. All ten PRs are open and non-security-sensitive in the hydrated preflight artifact. Low-signal and instant closeout are disabled, and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by the job, so no mutating close, merge, or fix action is planned. Each PR needs maintainer or technical correctness judgment before any future merge/close path.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix correctness and the replay-boundary behavior require maintainer judgment before any merge path.
Provider prompt routing and compatibility correctness require maintainer review; merge is blocked by job policy.
There is active author follow-up plus a cron/session lifecycle product decision; keep open for maintainer judgment.
Abandoned draft with useful but incomplete code cannot be closed or replaced in this no-fix/no-close inventory job without maintainer direction.
Useful replacement-style bot PR has an uneditable branch, compatibility concerns, and a failing check; merge/fix actions are blocked by the job.
Compatibility-sensitive behavior change plus failing proof and active author follow-up require maintainer judgment.
Focused availability bug fix has maintainer signal, stale/rebase work, and incomplete hydrated review details; no merge or fix is allowed in this job.
Native command ordering is a product/UX decision with maintainer signal, failing proof, and incomplete hydrated review state.
Draft provider/model-routing fix needs proof and compatibility review; missing live PR details block a confident non-mutating classification beyond maintainer review.
Large test-only PR has conflict/refresh work and incomplete hydrated live PR details; merge/fix actions are blocked by the job.

needs_human: #89714: maintainer must accept or reject the Control UI stale replay suppression boundary before any merge path.
#89716: maintainer/provider owner should review non-Anthropic prompt marker stripping and compatibility implications.
#89721: maintainer should decide whether the deleted-job/orphan cron base-session lifecycle stays out of scope for this test-only PR.
#52236: maintainer should decide whether to close, leave open, or spin out a future Mattermost thread-routing fix; this job cannot close or replace it.
#89790: maintainer should resolve the failing check and decide whether to proceed with the uneditable ClawSweeper Google Chat replacement PR.
#89748: maintainer should decide the compatibility-sensitive final-chunk whitespace behavior, with Real behavior proof currently failing.
#84666: maintainer should review the diagnostic active-abort guard after branch refresh and proof/review blockers are resolved.
#85034: maintainer should decide the /new command ordering UX change after proof/rebase and missing review hydration are resolved.
#85696: maintainer/provider owner should review proof and compatibility for embedded model static-catalog fast path; live PR details were incomplete.
#86450: maintainer should refresh/conflict-resolve and review the large node CLI test-only PR; live PR details were incomplete.
